purpose: Generated-output proof for Wave70 mf70_cheeks_skin mask routing using the active MOD-17 Canny v3 portrait as source.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: very subtle photoreal cheek skin preservation pass, preserve exact face identity, preserve left and right cheek skin tone, natural pore texture, soft realistic cheek lighting continuity, eyes, gaze direction, nose shape, mouth and lip shape, jawline contour, hairline, background, neck, and clothing unchanged
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, age change, gender presentation change, face shape drift, skin tone change, cheek shape change, nose deformation, changed lips, open mouth, visible teeth, jawline change, hairline change, hair volume change, eye color change, gaze drift, distorted eyes, neck change, clothing change, background change, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed cheeks, visible seam, blotchy skin, watermark, text

qa_focus: cheek skin texture and lighting continuity
eyes, nose, mouth, hairline, and jawline protection
no visible seam around cheek mask boundaries
hair, neck, background, and clothing protection

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the Wave70 cheeks-skin mask as the inpaint mask with very low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing protected-neighbor and identity drift.
